query:
-- Buscar vendas com status 'sale' e comissão zerada
SELECT 
  id,
  buyerName,
  saleValue,
  totalCommission,
  status,
  saleDate,
  createdAt,
  brokerVendedor,
  businessType
FROM sales 
WHERE status = 'sale' 
  AND (totalCommission IS NULL OR totalCommission = '0' OR totalCommission = '0.00')
LIMIT 10;
